subtopics: Tangents and Powers of a point

questions.question: The standard equation of a circle with center (h, k) and radius r is ______.
In the general equation of a circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0, the center is ______.
The radius of the circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 is ______.
The diagram show a circle passing through the origin. For such a circle, the constant 'c' in the general equation is ______.
questions.diagram_description: A circle in the Cartesian plane specifically passing through (0,0).

questions.question: The equation x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 represents a point circle if ______.
The power of a point P(x₁, y₁) with respect to circle S = 0 is ______.
A point P(x₁, y₁) lies inside the circle S = 0 if ______.
The diagram show a line just touching a circle. This line is called a ______.
questions.diagram_description: A circle and a straight line that intersects it at exactly one point.

questions.question: The condition for the line y = mx + c to be a tangent to the circle x² + y² = a² is ______.
The length of the tangent from external point P(x₁, y₁) to circle S = 0 is ______.
Parametric equations of the circle (x-h)² + (y-k)² = r² are ______.

options.A: x = h + r cos θ, y = k + r sin θ
options.B: x = r cos θ, y = r sin θ
options.C: x = h + r sec θ, y = k + r tan θ
options.D: x = h + r sin θ, y = k + r cos θ

questions.question: The diagram show two circles touching each other externally. The distance between their centers is ______.
questions.diagram_description: Two circles of radii r1 and r2 meeting at a single point on the outside.

questions.question: Two circles touch each other internally if the distance between centers is ______.
Equation of the tangent at (x₁, y₁) to the circle x² + y² = a² is ______.
The diagram show a 'Pole' and 'Polar'. If P is the pole, the line of contact of tangents from P is the ______.
questions.diagram_description: A point P outside a circle, two tangents drawn from it, and a line connecting the two points of tangency.

questions.question: Find the center of the circle x² + y² - 4x + 6y - 12 = 0.
Intercept made by the circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 on x-axis is ______.
The diagram show a circle centered at (3, 4) touching the x-axis. Its radius is ______.
questions.diagram_description: A circle in the first quadrant which just grazes the horizontal axis.

questions.question: Equation of normal at (x₁, y₁) to the circle x² + y² = a² is ______.
A circle having its center on the x-axis will have ______ in its general equation.
The diagram show orthogonal circles. The angle of intersection between them is ______.
questions.diagram_description: Two circles intersecting such that their tangents at the intersection point are perpendicular.

questions.question: Condition for two circles S=0 and S'=0 to be orthogonal is ______.
Equation of common chord of two circles S=0 and S'=0 is ______.
The area of the circle x² + y² = 16 is ______.
The diagram show a 'Radical Axis'. For any point on this axis, the lengths of tangents to the two circles are ______.
questions.diagram_description: A line between two non-intersecting circles with tangent lines drawn from a point on the axis to both circles.

questions.question: Radical axis of two circles is always ______ to the line joining their centers.
If the circle x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 touches the y-axis, then ______.
The diagram show a circle and a point P. If P lies on the circle, its power is ______.
questions.diagram_description: A point P sitting exactly on the circumference of a circle.

questions.question: Tangent to x² + y² = r² at (r cos θ, r sin θ) is ______.

options.A: x cos θ + y sin θ = r
options.B: x sin θ + y cos θ = r
options.C: x cos θ - y sin θ = r

questions.question: Number of common tangents to two circles which are disjoint (far apart) is ______.
The diagram show a circle and three points A, B, C inside, on, and outside. Point C has ______ power.
questions.diagram_description: Point A inside, B on, and C far outside the circle.

questions.question: Equation of the circle with (x₁, y₁) and (x₂, y₂) as ends of diameter is ______.
The diagram show tangent lines from P. The angle between them is tan⁻¹ of ______.
questions.diagram_description: Point P outside, two tangents PT1 and PT2 making an angle θ.

questions.question: Polar of the origin with respect to x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 is ______.
If two circles are orthogonal, the square of distance between centers is ______.
The diagram show a 'Circle System'. The equation S + λL = 0 represents circles passing through ______.
questions.diagram_description: A fixed circle S and a line L intersecting it, with several other circles drawn through the intersection points.

options.A: Points of intersection of S and L

questions.question: The center of the circle passing through (0,0), (a,0) and (0,b) is ______.
Length of the intercept on y-axis by x² + y² + 2gx + 2fy + c = 0 is ______.
The diagram show two circles with one common tangent. This happens if they ______.
questions.diagram_description: One circle inside another, touching it at a single point (Internally tangent).

questions.question: Inverse of a point (x₁, y₁) with respect to x² + y² = a² is ______.
The diagram show a 'Circle through three points'. To find its center, we intersect the ______ of the chords.
questions.diagram_description: A triangle inscribed in a circle, with perpendicular bisectors of sides meeting at the center.

questions.question: Radius of circle S + λS' = 0 depends on the parameter ______.
Minimum distance from a point P to a circle with center C and radius r is ______.
The diagram show a line passing through the center. This line is always a ______ to the circle.
questions.diagram_description: A straight line that goes through the midpoint of the circle.

questions.question: If a line is a normal to a circle, it must pass through the ______.
The area of a circle whose radius is half of another's is ______ the original area.
The diagram show a 'Director Circle'. It is the locus of intersection of ______ tangents.
questions.diagram_description: A circle and its outer concentric circle, with two perpendicular tangents meeting on the outer one.

questions.question: Equation of director circle for x² + y² = a² is ______.
The distance between centers of x² + y² = 9 and (x-4)² + y² = 16 is ______.
The equation x² + y² + 2x - 4y + 20 = 0 represents a ______.
